description:
Implement `hx-tile` (T3 tier) — 2/6 libraries ship this. Clickable tile for dashboards, navigation grids, and selection patterns.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-tile/`:
- `index.ts`, `hx-tile.ts`, `hx-tile.styles.ts`, `hx-tile.stories.ts`, `hx-tile.test.ts`

**Props:** `href` (string — renders as link), `selected` (boolean), `disabled` (boolean), `variant` (`default`|`outlined`|`filled`)

**Slots:** `icon` (large icon/illustration at top), `label`, `description`, `badge` (overlay badge)

**Events:** `hx-click`, `hx-select` (when selectable)

**CSS Parts:** `base`, `icon`, `label`, `description`, `badge`

**ARIA:** When `href` provided: renders as `<a>`. When selectable (no href): `role="button"` with `aria-pressed`. When disabled: `aria-disabled="true"`. Focus ring visible in all interactive modes.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests (link mode, button mode, selected, disabled), axe-core zero violations, Storybook all variants + grid layout demo, bundle < 3KB.

Register in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-tile — T3 Clickable Tile/Card
